people.action: kneeling on the ground, looking up fearfully at a giant humanoid creature.
charging forward and swinging a large weapon, causing soldiers to fall.
standing in formation, holding shields and weapons, then being overrun and falling in battle.

scene.setting: dark and chaotic, with soldiers and a giant creature engaged in combat.

interactions: The giant creature attacks the soldiers, knocking them down.

visual_expression.gaze: looking up at the giant creature.

audio_description: A dramatic and intense orchestral score with powerful percussion and string instruments plays, creating a sense of epic conflict and urgency.
